name: remove_bg
description: Remove video background using RVM — outputs ProRes 4444 .mov with alpha + VP9 WebM preview. LONG-RUNNING: typically 1–5 minutes per clip on MPS/GPU depending on length and resolution. Always run via --inputs batch mode, fire in the background, and pass --progress to emit per-frame JSON progress lines to stderr so you can monitor status. Quality tuning: use rvm_resnet50 for complex/cluttered backgrounds; use downsample 1.0 for sharper edges (slower). Default settings are fast; prefer quality settings for final output.

output.description: { nobg_src: ProRes 4444 .mov for render, nobg_preview_src: VP9 WebM for browser preview }

params.name: input
params.description: Single source video file (mutually exclusive with inputs)

params.name: model
params.description: rvm_mobilenetv3: fast, good for clean backgrounds. rvm_resnet50: slower, significantly better on complex/cluttered backgrounds.

params.name: downsample
params.description: Inference resolution ratio (0.25–1.0). Auto-detected from available memory when omitted: 0.25 on 8 GB, 0.375 on 16 GB, 0.5 on 32 GB+. 1.0 = full resolution (4x slower, sharper edges and finer hair/detail).
